---
title: "tsa"
output:
  html_document: default
  word_document: default
date: "2026-02-01"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r cars, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(bibliometrix)
library(tidyverse)
library(viridis)
library(plotly)
library(ggraph)
library(igraph)
library(tidygraph)
library(ggthemes)
library(hrbrthemes)
```

```{r theme}
theme_set(
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
)
```


```{r chargement, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
setwd("C:/Users/ADECHIAN/OneDrive/Documenten/tsa_project/TSA")

# Importation des données
data <- convert2df(
  file = list.files(pattern = ".txt"),
  dbsource = "wos",
  format = "plaintext"
)

# Analyse bibliométrique
results <- biblioAnalysis(data)

# Résumé
S <- summary(results, k = 10, pause = FALSE)
```



```{r plot, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ggplot(pubs_year, aes(x = factor(PY), y = n, group = 1)) +

  # Ligne
  geom_line(
    color = "#1f77b4",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +

  # Points
  geom_point(
    color = "#1f77b4",
    size = 1
  ) +

  # Titres
  labs(
    title = "Publications annuelles sur le TSA et l’environnement",
    x = "Année",
    y = "Nombre de publications"
  ) +

  # Thème
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +

  theme(

    # Titre
    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      face = "bold",
      size = 12
    ),

    # Titres axes
    axis.title.x = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    axis.title.y = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    # Texte axes
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 8,
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1,
      color = "black"
    ),

    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 8,
      color = "black"
    ),

    # Fond blanc
    panel.background = element_rect(
      fill = "white"
    ),

    plot.background = element_rect(
      fill = "white"
    ),

    # Grille complète
    panel.grid.major = element_line(
      color = "lightgray",
      linewidth = 0.5
    ),

    panel.grid.minor = element_line(
      color = "gray90",
      linewidth = 0.25
    ),

    # Bordure noire
    panel.border = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.5
    )
  )
```

```{r top auteurs, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
top_authors <- data.frame(
  Author = names(results$Authors),
  Freq = as.numeric(results$Authors)
)

top_authors <- top_authors %>%
  arrange(desc(Freq)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

ggplot(top_authors,
       aes(x = reorder(Author, Freq),
           y = Freq)) +

  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    fill = "#1f77b4",
    width = 0.7
  ) +

  coord_flip() +

  labs(
    title = "Les auteurs les plus productifs",
    x = "Auteur",
    y = "Nombre de publications"
  ) +

  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +

  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      face = "bold",
      size = 12
    ),

    axis.title.x = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    axis.title.y = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 8,
      color = "black"
    ),

    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 8,
      color = "black"
    ),

    panel.grid.major = element_line(
      color = "lightgray",
      linewidth = 0.5
    ),

    panel.grid.minor = element_line(
      color = "gray90",
      linewidth = 0.25
    ),

    panel.border = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.5
    )
  )
```

```{r top journaux, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
top_sources <- data.frame(
  Journal = names(results$Sources),
  Freq = as.numeric(results$Sources)
)

top_sources <- top_sources %>%
  arrange(desc(Freq)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

ggplot(top_sources,
       aes(x = reorder(Journal, Freq),
           y = Freq)) +

  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    fill = "#1f77b4",
    width = 0.7
  ) +

  coord_flip() +

  labs(
    title = "Les journaux les plus représentés",
    x = "Journal",
    y = "Nombre de publications"
  ) +

  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +

  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      face = "bold",
      size = 12
    ),

    axis.title.x = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    axis.title.y = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 8,
      color = "black"
    ),

    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 8,
      color = "black"
    ),

    panel.grid.major = element_line(
      color = "lightgray",
      linewidth = 0.5
    ),

    panel.grid.minor = element_line(
      color = "gray90",
      linewidth = 0.25
    ),

    panel.border = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.5
    )
  )
```


```{r top pays, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)

# Extraction des pays
top_countries <- metaTagExtraction(
  data,
  Field = "AU_CO",
  sep = ";"
)

# Séparer les pays correctement
country_freq <- top_countries %>%

  select(AU_CO) %>%

  separate_rows(AU_CO, sep = ";") %>%

  mutate(
    AU_CO = str_trim(AU_CO)
  ) %>%

  filter(AU_CO != "") %>%

  count(AU_CO, sort = TRUE) %>%

  slice_head(n = 20)

# Graphique
ggplot(country_freq,
       aes(x = reorder(AU_CO, n),
           y = n)) +

  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    fill = "#1f77b4",
    width = 0.7
  ) +

  coord_flip() +

  labs(
    title = "Les pays les plus productifs",
    x = "Pays",
    y = "Nombre de publications"
  ) +

  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +

  theme(

    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      face = "bold",
      size = 12
    ),

    axis.title.x = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    axis.title.y = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 8,
      color = "black"
    ),

    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 8,
      color = "black"
    ),

    panel.grid.major = element_line(
      color = "lightgray",
      linewidth = 0.5
    ),

    panel.grid.minor = element_line(
      color = "gray90",
      linewidth = 0.25
    ),

    panel.border = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.5
    )
  )
```


```{r top mot, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ================================
# FREQUENCE MOYENNE DE CITATIONS PAR ARTICLE ET PAR AN
# ================================

current_year <- 2026

# Calcul citations/an pour chaque article
data$citations_per_year <- data$TC / (current_year - data$PY + 1)

# Moyenne par année
mean_citations <- data %>%
  group_by(PY) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_citations_per_year = mean(
      citations_per_year,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  )

# Graphique
ggplot(
  mean_citations,
  aes(
    x = PY,
    y = mean_citations_per_year
  )
) +

  geom_line(
    color = "#1f77b4",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +

  geom_point(
    color = "#1f77b4",
    size = 1
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Fréquence moyenne de citations par article et par an",
    x = "Année",
    y = "Moyenne des citations/an"
  ) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(
      min(mean_citations$PY),
      max(mean_citations$PY),
      by = 1
    )
  ) +

  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +

  theme(

    # Titre
    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      face = "bold",
      size = 12
    ),

    # Titres axes
    axis.title.x = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    axis.title.y = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    # Texte axes
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 8,
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1,
      color = "black"
    ),

    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 8,
      color = "black"
    ),

    # Fond blanc
    panel.background = element_rect(
      fill = "white"
    ),

    plot.background = element_rect(
      fill = "white"
    ),

    # Grille
    panel.grid.major = element_line(
      color = "lightgray",
      linewidth = 0.5
    ),

    panel.grid.minor = element_line(
      color = "gray90",
      linewidth = 0.25
    ),

    # Bordure
    panel.border = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.5
    )
  )
```


```{r frequence_moyenne, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# TOP 10 DES MOTS-CLES

library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Extraction des mots-clés
keywords <- data$DE %>%

  na.omit() %>%

  str_split(";") %>%

  unlist() %>%

  str_trim()

# Fréquences
keywords_freq <- as.data.frame(
  sort(
    table(keywords),
    decreasing = TRUE
  )
)

# Renommage colonnes
colnames(keywords_freq) <- c(
  "Keyword",
  "Freq"
)

# Top 10
keywords_freq <- keywords_freq %>%

  slice_head(n = 10)

# Graphique
ggplot(
  keywords_freq,
  aes(
    x = reorder(Keyword, Freq),
    y = Freq
  )
) +

  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    fill = "#1f77b4",
    width = 0.7
  ) +

  coord_flip() +

  labs(
    title = "Les mots-clé les plus fréquents",
    x = "Mot-clé",
    y = "Fréquence"
  ) +

  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +

  theme(

    # Titre
    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      face = "bold",
      size = 12
    ),

    # Titres axes
    axis.title.x = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    axis.title.y = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    # Texte axes
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 8,
      color = "black"
    ),

    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 8,
      color = "black"
    ),

    # Fond blanc
    panel.background = element_rect(
      fill = "white"
    ),

    plot.background = element_rect(
      fill = "white"
    ),

    # Grille
    panel.grid.major = element_line(
      color = "lightgray",
      linewidth = 0.5
    ),

    panel.grid.minor = element_line(
      color = "gray90",
      linewidth = 0.25
    ),

    # Bordure
    panel.border = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.5
    )
  )
```


```{r moyen total, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# NOMBRE MOYEN TOTAL DE CITATIONS PAR AN

# Moyenne des citations totales par année
mean_total_citations <- data %>%
  group_by(PY) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_total_TC = mean(
      TC,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  )

# Graphique
ggplot(
  mean_total_citations,
  aes(
    x = PY,
    y = mean_total_TC
  )
) +

  geom_line(
    color = "#1f77b4",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +

  geom_point(
    color = "#1f77b4",
    size = 1
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Nombre moyen total de citations par an",
    x = "Année",
    y = "Moyenne des citations"
  ) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(
      min(mean_total_citations$PY),
      max(mean_total_citations$PY),
      by = 1
    )
  ) +

  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +

  theme(

    # Titre
    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      face = "bold",
      size = 12
    ),

    # Titres axes
    axis.title.x = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    axis.title.y = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    # Texte axes
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 8,
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1,
      color = "black"
    ),

    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 8,
      color = "black"
    ),

    # Fond blanc
    panel.background = element_rect(
      fill = "white"
    ),

    plot.background = element_rect(
      fill = "white"
    ),

    # Grille
    panel.grid.major = element_line(
      color = "lightgray",
      linewidth = 0.5
    ),

    panel.grid.minor = element_line(
      color = "gray90",
      linewidth = 0.25
    ),

    # Bordure
    panel.border = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.5
    )
  )
```

```{r collaboration, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ================================
# PAYS AYANT LE PLUS COLLABORE
# AVEC D'AUTRES PAYS
# ================================

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)

# Extraction des pays
country_data <- metaTagExtraction(
  data,
  Field = "AU_CO",
  sep = ";"
)

# Liste des pays par article
articles_countries <- country_data %>%

  select(AU_CO) %>%

  mutate(
    AU_CO = str_split(AU_CO, ";")
  ) %>%

  mutate(
    AU_CO = map(
      AU_CO,
      ~ unique(str_trim(.x))
    )
  )

# Création des paires de collaborations
collab_list <- list()

for(i in 1:nrow(articles_countries)) {

  countries <- articles_countries$AU_CO[[i]]

  # Garder uniquement collaborations internationales
  if(length(countries) > 1) {

    pairs <- combn(
      countries,
      2,
      simplify = FALSE
    )

    collab_list <- append(
      collab_list,
      pairs
    )
  }
}

# Transformation en dataframe
collab_df <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(
    collab_list,
    function(x) {
      data.frame(
        country1 = x[1],
        country2 = x[2]
      )
    }
  )
)

# Comptage collaborations par pays
country_collab <- collab_df %>%

  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(country1, country2),
    values_to = "Country"
  ) %>%

  count(
    Country,
    sort = TRUE
  ) %>%

  slice_head(n = 10)

# Graphique
ggplot(
  country_collab,
  aes(
    x = reorder(Country, n),
    y = n
  )
) +

  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    fill = "#1f77b4",
    width = 0.7
  ) +

  coord_flip() +

  labs(
    title = "Les pays les plus collaboratifs",
    x = "Pays",
    y = "Nombre de collaborations internationales"
  ) +

  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +

  theme(

    # Titre
    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      face = "bold",
      size = 12
    ),

    # Titres axes
    axis.title.x = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    axis.title.y = element_text(
      size = 10,
      face = "bold"
    ),

    # Texte axes
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 8,
      color = "black"
    ),

    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 8,
      color = "black"
    ),

    # Fond blanc
    panel.background = element_rect(
      fill = "white"
    ),

    plot.background = element_rect(
      fill = "white"
    ),

    # Grille
    panel.grid.major = element_line(
      color = "lightgray",
      linewidth = 0.5
    ),

    panel.grid.minor = element_line(
      color = "gray90",
      linewidth = 0.25
    ),

    # Bordure
    panel.border = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.5
    )
  )
```
